title: T00 — Create project tracking card and definition of done
description: Create the project tracking card, execution rules, and explicit definition of done before implementation starts.

title: T01 — Create project skeleton under workspace
description: Create the portfolio project folder structure, seed PRD/TASKS references, and establish deterministic project layout.

title: T02 — Create Portfolio CIO SOUL.md
description: Write the portfolio agent identity, GARP philosophy, tone, and non-negotiable behavior rules.

title: T03 — Create Portfolio USER.md
description: Capture investor profile, brokers, hurdle, sizing, and portfolio operating context.

title: T04 — Create project-level CLAUDE.md derived dev rules
description: Translate the CLAUDE template into project-specific development rules, anti-patterns, and playbooks.
error: Sub-agent spawn blocked earlier: gateway closed (1008) unauthorized on local loopback. Card not completed.

title: T05 — Create SDD specification pack for this project
description: Create architecture/module specification docs following SDD so implementation can be decomposed cleanly.

title: T06 — Create initial delivery roadmap and milestones
description: Map the PRD into phases, milestones, and execution sequencing for V1.

title: T07 — Define Google Sheets source-of-truth schema
description: Lock tabs, columns, formulas, ownership, and update semantics for the spreadsheet.

title: T08 — Define market data contract and ticker normalization rules
description: Define supported assets, ticker mapping, macro series, and output fields from data providers.

title: T09 — Define analytics contract for V1
description: Specify the exact V1 metrics, formulas, benchmarks, and BRL-normalized outputs.

title: T10 — Define reporting contract for Discord outputs
description: Specify the exact daily alerts and sunday briefing shape for Discord delivery.

title: T11 — Design portfolio-sheets skill spec
description: Specify the Google Sheets read/write skill, batch update behavior, and error handling.

title: T12 — Design market-data skill spec
description: Specify the market data skill using yfinance and macro sources with fallback behavior.

title: T13 — Design macro-monitor skill spec
description: Specify macro data collection responsibilities, cadence, and target fields.

title: T14 — Design analysis-engine skill spec
description: Specify deepdive, relatório, valuation, macro, risk, and committee command behavior.

title: T15 — Design portfolio-analytics skill spec
description: Specify analytics computations for beta, concentration, FX exposure, and winners/losers.

title: T16 — Define cron and scheduling spec
description: Specify daily 23:00 BRT and sunday cadence, timezone handling, and retry behavior.

title: T17 — Define observability and run-log spec
description: Specify logs, run history, operator visibility, and failure diagnostics.

title: T18 — Create Google Sheet bootstrap task spec
description: Specify exact spreadsheet bootstrap flow, tab creation, formulas, and permissions.

title: T18b — Validate external access readiness (GWS + yfinance + BCB)
description: Validate Google Sheets write access, yfinance coverage, and BCB availability before implementation starts.

title: T19 — Create knowledge base migration plan
description: List the knowledge files to migrate, naming conventions, and validation steps.

title: T20 — Define position ingest bootstrap flow
description: Specify how current positions, PM, and metadata will be loaded into the system.

title: T21 — Define analyst-persona derivation workflow
description: Specify how final analyst personas are derived from the real portfolio and extended later.

title: T22 — Define thesis status and kill-switch workflow
description: Specify how thesis status and kill switches are stored, reviewed, and alerted.

title: T23 — Define daily close update implementation task
description: Specify the end-to-end daily job from price fetch to sheet update and Discord alerting.

title: T24 — Define sunday research implementation task
description: Specify the weekly macro/sector/earnings briefing pipeline and appendix generation.

title: T25 — Define Discord command set and routing
description: Specify supported Discord commands, input contracts, and allowed side effects.

title: T26 — Define validation checklist for market and analytics outputs
description: Specify smoke checks for price integrity, FX conversion, and analytics correctness.

title: T27 — Define validation checklist for research outputs
description: Specify review checks for research quality, source hygiene, and portfolio implications.

title: T28 — Define test strategy and quality gates for V1
description: Specify fixtures, contract tests, smoke tests, and merge-quality gates.

title: T29 — Define git/worktree execution strategy for agent team
description: Specify branch/worktree strategy, file ownership, and conflict protocol for execution.

title: T30 — Final backlog audit against PRD and references
description: Audit task coverage against PRD, CLAUDE template, and SDD references before execution starts.

title: P31 — Create live position panel for active portfolio management
description: Build the master live panel per position with owner, weight, thesis status, next event, risk, current CIO action, and monitoring priority.
result: Built the live position panel operational layer, including schema, vocabulary, populated cockpit, and references from existing portfolio control files.

title: P32 — Define monitoring triggers by position and factor
description: Create explicit per-position and portfolio-level triggers so monitoring reacts to material changes instead of noise.
result: Created the trigger system for active management: audit, taxonomy, trigger matrix, and operational integration.

title: P33 — Define operating cadence for active management
description: Define daily, weekly, monthly, and event-driven routines for the CIO and specialist layers.
result: Created the active-management cadence layer: audit, operating cadence, playbooks, templates, and protocol integration.

title: P34 — Create CIO decision log and action workflow
description: Create the decision ledger, state transitions, and execution workflow so recommendations become traceable portfolio actions.
result: Created the CIO decision layer: audit, schema, workflow, decision log, template, and operational integration.

title: P31.1 — Audit current portfolio control files and identify fields for live panel
description: Parent: mmru1glp343f. Review current snapshot, overview, thesis registry, and coverage map to derive the canonical live-panel schema.
result: Audited current portfolio control files and identified the required live-panel schema plus operational gaps.

title: P31.2 — Design live position panel schema and status vocabulary
description: Parent: mmru1glp343f. Define columns, state enums, and monitoring priorities for the master panel.
result: Defined the live-panel schema, status vocabulary, CIO action states, role labels, and monitoring priority system.

title: P31.3 — Create live position panel files and populate with current portfolio
description: Parent: mmru1glp343f. Create the operational files and seed them with the validated 2026-03-15 portfolio snapshot.
result: Created the live position panel and populated it with the validated 2026-03-15 portfolio, including owner, role, CIO action, and monitoring priority.

title: P31.4 — Reconcile references so the live panel becomes the operational source
description: Parent: mmru1glp343f. Update overview, registry, and governance docs to point to the new live panel.
result: Reconciled overview, thesis, and coverage references so the new live panel is the operational source of truth for daily management.

title: P32.1 — Audit current portfolio for trigger design needs
description: Parent: mmru1gltr87q. Review panel, risk map, and frameworks to identify which trigger categories are required.
result: Audited trigger-design needs across positions, portfolio factors, and existing monitoring frameworks.

title: P32.2 — Define trigger taxonomy for positions and portfolio factors
description: Parent: mmru1gltr87q. Create stable trigger classes for earnings, macro, valuation, technical, regulatory, concentration, and thesis breakage.
result: Defined the trigger taxonomy with six stable classes plus escalation rules and response-time expectations.

title: P32.3 — Build trigger matrix for all current positions and top-level factors
description: Parent: mmru1gltr87q. Populate the trigger matrix using the validated portfolio and current coverage structure.
result: Built the full trigger matrix for every current position plus shared portfolio factors, with escalation and expected action.

title: P32.4 — Integrate trigger references into operational docs
description: Parent: mmru1gltr87q. Update live-panel and monitoring references so trigger review becomes part of daily management.
result: Integrated trigger references into the live panel, monitoring checklist, and ops README so the trigger system is part of daily management.

title: P33.1 — Audit current routines and gaps for active-management cadence
description: Parent: mmru1glv6lg0. Review existing protocols and identify what is missing for daily/weekly/monthly/event-driven execution.
result: Audited existing protocols and identified the missing daily/weekly/monthly/event-driven cadence layers.

title: P33.2 — Define CIO operating cadence across daily, weekly, monthly, and event-driven loops
description: Parent: mmru1glv6lg0. Write the cadence framework with clear scopes and outputs.
result: Defined the CIO operating cadence across daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and event-driven loops.

title: P33.3 — Create operational playbooks for each cadence layer
description: Parent: mmru1glv6lg0. Turn the cadence into concrete checklists / deliverables for the CIO and specialists.
result: Created the operational playbooks and templates for the daily monitor, weekly CIO note, monthly review, and event-driven review.

title: P33.4 — Integrate cadence into committee protocols and ops index
description: Parent: mmru1glv6lg0. Update macro, reporting, and ops references so cadence is embedded in normal operation.
result: Integrated cadence into reporting and macro protocols, expanded the ops index, and created an active-management operating-system summary.

title: P34.1 — Audit decision-traceability gaps in current portfolio workflow
description: Parent: mmru1glwfbgi. Review current docs to identify missing decision logging and state-transition mechanics.
result: Audited the current workflow and identified the missing decision-traceability layer for active management.

title: P34.2 — Define CIO decision-log schema and portfolio action states
description: Parent: mmru1glwfbgi. Specify the canonical decision record and state transitions from monitor to action.
result: Defined the CIO decision schema and action-state workflow for position, factor, and portfolio decisions.

title: P34.3 — Create CIO decision log files and seed the first entries
description: Parent: mmru1glwfbgi. Create the log, templates, and initial entries reflecting current portfolio posture and system decisions.
result: Created the CIO decision log, decision template, and seeded the first operating-system and portfolio-level decisions.

title: P34.4 — Integrate decision workflow into live panel and committee operating system
description: Parent: mmru1glwfbgi. Update references so decisions become part of the normal loop rather than ad-hoc commentary.
result: Integrated the decision workflow into the live-panel schema, ops index, and operating-system references; linked key panel rows to active decisions.
